text.message: Can we stop trading blue the game now ?
But please I’m not that ahead
If you think I’m way ahead of oj or red you are wrong
Nobody is giving you a city red you already take road uncontested
What did I do to blue? Hah.
Honestly what did I do blue?
But you know I’m in last and solo me and make up some story
Oh…NOW you want to trade lol
Still waiting for reason why you soloed me?
Oj you have to take army now
he has the mats to pop
I don’t mind OJ winning tbh
he can trade I’ve counted his cards
Can we shut that guy up ^
I’m chill with oj winning he played well
